완벽 흡수 — Perfect Absorption

✅ Must-Do Checklist

✓
Apply sunscreen on cheeks only — no forehead
✓
Use 3 pumps max in dot formation (both cheeks)
✓
Film application at 8× speed
✓
Maximum 2 layers — show both layers absorb cleanly
✓
Natural light only — no ring light or heavy filter
✓
Captions in English — follow provided caption text per cut
✓
No white cast, no pilling, no residue — if it pills, redo
